faceShapeMatches.Round: Textured quiff or high-volume top cut with short sides to elongate vertical proportions.
faceShapeMatches.Square: Soft side-swept bangs or textured crops to soften the hard jaw corners.
faceShapeMatches.Oval: Versatile compatibility. A medium-length pompadour or layered flow works best.

washRules.Dry: Wash 1-2 times per week with sulfate-free hydrating shampoo.
washRules.Oily: Wash 3-4 times per week with clarifying shampoo.
